items.title: Ruhbaru
items.copy: The sound of home, scaled into a cinematic live experience. From Sufi to cinematic pop, ghazal to qawwali — an intimate world of longing, devotion, memory, and renewal. Come face to face · India tour 2026.

items.title: Jupiter Pe Juice
items.copy: Truth wrapped in melody. Satire served fresh. A 90-minute musical satire where everyday absurdities become songs, punchlines, and cultural commentary. Funny first. Truth later. Stays after.
